title: Minecraft: 2035 Edition
description: What will Minecraft look like in 2035? (Ideas submitted by Knarfy's fans for a video)
body:
![Minecraft: 2035 Edition Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c943145a62eebc40da926551fcca8a38a43367c.png)
# The Future is here and it's all your fault!

We asked you what the future of Minecraft looks like and added those features into the game. Your ideas are insane and the video is wild. 

**Check out the original concept here:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Jsw409lEFAI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**The following features are included in the mod:**
- Cars & Hovercars
  - Using a steering wheel, you can upgrade a minecart to a car. Then using a hover pad, you can upgrade that car into a hover car.
- Bob
  - Includes better armor and gear.
  - Bob Ore drops Bobs and Bob is smeltable into Bob ingots
  - Right click on Bob with the Bob ingot to trade with Bob
  - Pick up Bob by right clicking on him
- Temple of Subscribe
  - Spawns in jungles and future biomes.
  - Subscribe tuff blocks can be powered to start a subscribe party
  - Subscribe button item is craftable with three white wool
- Creep, Creeper, Creepest
  - The creep is a new tiny creeper that explodes into confetti if interacted with at all
  - The creepest is a gigantic creeper that stomps on you until you attack it, then it explodes
- Alien Invasions
  - Use /startinvasion to start an invasion
  - Ufos will spawn aliens if there are no aliens in a specific radius
  - Aliens are a new mob that drop laser guns when killed
- Explosive sheep
  - Look like regular sheep other than their red eyes
  - When sheared, they change form and explode 
- New platypus mob
  - Doesn't do much
  - Perry's hat is craftable with a brown and black wool. I wonder what would happen if you right clicked on the platypus with it
- polar bear with a purple shirt
  - Craft a purple shirt with purple wool and give it to a polar bear
  - right click on the polar bear for it to ask you to subscribe
  - If you give it anything other than a subscribe button the polar bear will explode. But if you give it a subscribe button it will give you a bunch of overpowered items.
- An end update
  - I'll let you figure this one out for yourself

### **Please do not add this mod to a world that you genuinely like. It will cause destruction and is not completely stable! These mods are designed specifically for YouTube videos and are not necessarily created with release in mind. Download at your own risk!**
